experience.title: Shraddha Thapar
experience.duration: 5. Do not build or share local collections: On occasion, deviant communities/individuals can be found creating Telegram groups, sharing folders upon folders of PDFs through mainstream cloud storage (or their own virtual cloud storage systems on sites like #Hetzner), or even passing around external storage devices. Avoid interacting with decentralized protocols like #IPFS or academic torrent archives. These immoral practices risk turning private circumvention into collective resistance. Compliance requires strict abstinence from communal strategies.
experience.description: Report this post               Shraddha Thapar reposted this         I am genuinely puzzled as to why my peers are struggling with the ban on #SciHub and #Libgen in India. Let's remember that this is about protecting the fragile ecosystem of academic publishing. Compliance is a straightforward ethical duty towards the multi-billion dollar corporations that rely on our obedience for their sustenance. Here are a few simple & practical guidelines for complying with this supposed ban on knowledge an

experience.title: Shraddha Thapar
experience.duration: The conference brought together leading scholars, practitioners, and thought leaders to engage in meaningful discussions on critical constitutional issues. Faculty members from the School of Law, including Professors Pritam Baruah, Pankhuri Agrawal, Shardool Kulkarni, and Shagun Bhargava, actively contributed by moderating and participating in panels on federalism, judicial accountability,  punishment and state violence, as well as the MP Singh Memorial panel.

experience.title: Shraddha Thapar
experience.description: Report this post               Shraddha Thapar liked this         Sonal Pinto         Sonal Pinto       1d               Shraddha Thapar liked this         Discipline isn’t about willpower. It’s about priorities. The real question isn’t “Do I feel like it right now?” It’s “What choice will my future self thank me for?” We often overvalue immediate comfort and undervalue long-term meaning. Discipline is simply correcting that bias again and again. Choose what matters most.               public_pr

experience.description: Report this post               Shraddha Thapar liked this         Centre for Law and Policy Research         Centre for Law and Policy Research       1d               Shraddha Thapar liked this         2 out of 25.  Across 25 High Courts, we have just 2 women Chief Justices in the high courts of Gujarat and Meghalaya.
